failure_reason: Added a Form-native application graph table SQL carrier for mutable routes. application-graph-node-port.fk emits create/update/delete SQL over graph_nodes, graph_node_revisions, and graph_edges; create records a __create__ revision snapshot, update merges properties and advances the per-node revision number, and delete clears connected edges before deleting the node. Public mutable front-door routes intentionally remain FastAPI until method-specific route rows bind request bodies, response projection, cache invalidation, and live DB execution proof.
